_comment: Copy to ~/.config/local-dictation/corrections.json and edit. Keys lowercase, values verbatim. Case-insensitive word-boundary match. Underscore-prefixed keys are ignored.
_dev_context_overrides: Common single-word substitutions for dev contexts. The 'maine' entry corrects a frequent ASR/Gemma misfire on 'push to main'. If you actually talk about the US state, delete that line — corrections beat the cleaner.
_personal_proper_nouns: Names Parakeet doesn't know. Add yours.
_brand_and_product_casing: Cleaner usually gets these but corrections are insurance.
